sglang.title: Add Tensor Parallel to torch_native_llama
sglang.author: kwen2501
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The torch_native_llama model does not have Tensor Parallel support today. This PR adds it, using torch.distributed APIs.
Modifications

Added a .tensor_parallel() utility;
Added ColwiseParallel and RowwiseParallel annotations to related sub-modules;

Tests
pytest test/srt/test_torch_tp.py

sglang.title: Add get_amdgpu_memory_capacity()
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Current use of get_gpu_memory_capacity() will break build for SGLang on ROCm (since v0.3.5.post2).
Modifications
Added get_amdgpu_memory_capacity(), and rename previous function to get_nvgpu_memory_capacity()

Checklist

[+] Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[+] Add uni

vllm.title: Add default value to avoid Falcon crash (#5363)
vllm.author: wchen61
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIX #5363 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix import error in tensorizer tests and cleanup some code
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I found that tensorizer tests are failing to import examples, so I've fixed it in this PR.
I have also cleaned up some of the code, see the commit messages.

vllm.title: [Doc] Remove float32 choice from --lora-dtype
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Remove float32 choice from --lora-dtype because float32 is not really supported.
I ran the command below following https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/docs/source/models/lora.rst:
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf \
    --enable-lora \
    --lora-modules sql-lora=$HOME/.cache/huggingfac

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix fully sharded LoRA bug
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #10342  (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
The issue arose because the code did not properly handle cases where all three lora_a
in MergedQKVParallelLinearWithShardedLora could be None. I also handled  this issue in MergedColumnParallelLinearWithShardedLoRA.
BTW, fix small typo in worke

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix some help info of arg_utils to improve readability
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have noticed some formatting issues in the help info of arg_utils. Specifically, some cases exist where words are connected without spaces when the text wraps to a new line.
For example,
parser.add_argument(
            '--num-gpu-blocks-override',
            type=int,
            default=None,

vllm.title: [core][misc] keep compatibility for old-style classes
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #10304 will be too annoying for users. let's keep the compatibility for a while, and only give a warning first.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Ensure special tokens are properly filtered out for guided structured output with MistralTokenizer
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR improves the support of the vllm MistralTokenizer with the guided structured output functionalities.
In particular:

the version of lm-format-enforcer is bumped to the latest version, so it includes the support of the vllm MistralTokenizer (noamgat/lm-format-enforcer#142)
the vllm MistralTok

vllm.title: [Misc] Bump up test_fused_moe tolerance
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Increase test_fused_moe() absolute tolerance. For some randomly generated input data, we go above it when running on large tensors.

vllm.title: [Misc] bump mistral common version
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This bumps the minimal required version for mistral_common to accommodate better tool use

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add --version flag to CLI
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The --version flag is a very common flag for checking the installed
version of a CLI utility, so let's include it here. -v is supported,
as well.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com
